scripts.worker:check: npm run worker:typecheck && WRANGLER_LOG_PATH=.wrangler/wrangler.log WRANGLER_SEND_METRICS=false wrangler deploy --dry-run --config worker/wrangler.jsonc --outdir .wrangler/deploy
scripts.worker:dev: WRANGLER_LOG_PATH=.wrangler/wrangler.log WRANGLER_SEND_METRICS=false wrangler dev --config worker/wrangler.jsonc --var SITE_ORIGIN:http://localhost:4321
scripts.worker:migrate:local: WRANGLER_LOG_PATH=.wrangler/wrangler.log WRANGLER_SEND_METRICS=false wrangler d1 migrations apply flypea-portfolio --local --config worker/wrangler.jsonc
scripts.worker:migrate:remote: WRANGLER_LOG_PATH=.wrangler/wrangler.log WRANGLER_SEND_METRICS=false wrangler d1 migrations apply flypea-portfolio --remote --config worker/wrangler.jsonc
scripts.verify: npm run check && npm run lint && npm run content:audit && npm run redirects:check && npm run content:test && npm run worker:check && npm run worker:test && npm run build && npm run site:check
